source.description: A private downstream adapter revealed a reusable pattern for promoting AI-assisted development output into public OSS.

summary: Document and test a privacy-safe promotion loop for turning useful private workflow output into public OSS artifacts.
public_value: Other OSS maintainers can use the same checklist to avoid leaking private context when publishing AI-assisted workflow improvements.

generalization.public_problem_statement: AI-assisted development needs a safe output process for promoting private workflow findings into public OSS.

checks.evidence: The candidate describes a synthetic workflow pattern and does not quote private records.
All proposed artifacts are public docs, examples, or tests in this repository.
The promotion check is report-only and does not create issues, releases, or external posts.

promotion_plan.maintainer_review: Open a public issue, implement through PR, run CI, then release in the next tagged version.
